description: Renders Arabic using Buckwalter's encoding scheme.

manifest.author: Amr Ojjeh
manifest.description: Renders Arabic using Buckwalter's encoding scheme.
manifest.name: Buckwalter Transliteration

name: Buckwalter Transliteration

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
I realized that it's annoying to type \* for (ذ) since Obsidian confuses it with italics, so now the plugin only searches within codes (which automatically escapes any traditional markup). Thus, if one writes \`b/h\*A\` (`b/h*A`), then the entire code block will be replaced by a span showing the Arabic. However, internal links do not require code blocks, so you can just write [[b/h*A]] and it will render correctly.

I also added the Arabic comma, so now you can do: `b/jbryl, byt`, and the English comma will be replaced with the Arabic comma.
releases.name: Changed Syntax

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
There can't be changes since this is the first release :)

Renders Arabic using Buckwalter's encoding scheme. It does not work with live preview.

Syntax: `b/Asmy Emrw/`

More info on Buckwalter's Transliteration can be found [here](http://www.qamus.org/transliteration.htm)
releases.name: Initial release
